tests.body:
Exercises the root `--version` command through `python -m ssot_registry` and through the `ssot`, `ssot-cli`, and `ssot-registry` console-entrypoint aliases with the workspace source roots on `PYTHONPATH`.

The test verifies successful execution without a subcommand, the alias-specific report header, the exact visible source-tree `ssot-*` package set, and the package versions resolved from each package `pyproject.toml`.
